description: Balanced adaptive-learning value across monitoring memory feedback governance community knowledge justice implementation and forgetting risk.
Prioritizes detection monitoring and evidence quality.
Prioritizes institutional ecological technical and community memory retention.
Prioritizes turning feedback into changed decisions.
Prioritizes flexible accountable governance and decision authority.
Prioritizes local knowledge lived experience and community warning systems.
Prioritizes equitable learning and protection for vulnerable groups.
Prioritizes penalties for institutional amnesia ecological memory loss and forgotten harm.
